risks.title: Scaffold Becomes Fake Product
risks.risk: Placeholder interfaces appear functional when backend systems are not implemented.
risks.mitigation: Clearly label unavailable features and avoid fake records.

risks.title: Framework Version Mismatch
risks.risk: Calendar dependencies diverge from RedDirt or Netlify support.
risks.mitigation: Inspect RedDirt, pin versions, validate production build. KCCC uses Next 16 while RedDirt remains on Next 15.

risks.title: Database Diagnostic Accidentally Mutates
risks.mitigation: Permit only a simple SELECT 1 probe.

risks.title: Environment Fallback Leaks Secrets
risks.risk: Reading RedDirt environment files exposes values.
risks.mitigation: Load server-side only, report presence rather than content, complete full controls in Step 3.

risks.title: Mobile Shell Overdesigned Too Early
risks.risk: Time is spent polishing a shell instead of delivering scheduling capability.
risks.mitigation: Build a clear reusable shell, then stop at Step 2 acceptance.
